underlying_goal: Integrate cuDF GPU engine into the nsdlp DLP system with proper compile-time flags, config plumbing, and build infrastructure
friction_detail: Multiple build errors during config plumbing: type mismatches (size_t vs int), missing accessor declarations, and fields added to wrong struct before finding the correct internal config struct.
brief_summary: User requested --enable-cudf compile flag and full build integration for a cuDF GPU engine; Claude delivered it across configure.ac, Makefiles, and config accessor chain despite several iterative build fixes.
